holdings.infoBox: QCMU is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 23.20%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 22.10%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 21.96%, QUALCOMM at 14.33%, and Qualcomm Inc Swap at 13.48%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily QCOM Bull 2X ETF (QCMU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the QUALCOMM Incorporated index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of QUALCOMM Incorporated. QCMU was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
